title: Mira Showers Zest Universal 90mm 4-Spray Shower Head - Chrome
features: Full coverage - with a 90mm showerhead face, enjoy the choice of 4 different sprays to suit your mood
Easy cleaning - rub-clean nozzles on the spray face, for easy cleaning and limescale removal
Ultimate compatibility - works with any shower on any system
Universal fit - compatible with all shower hoses and easy to fit - no tools required
Peace of mind - comes with a 1 year guarantee
description: From the manufacturer Over 100 Years of Innovation For the moment when everything just stops. We never have. Over our history, our products have been recognised for their design and innovation, but our focus has always been on creating products that make a difference you can feel. Creating World Firsts From creating the first thermostatic mixer to the first dual-outlet electric shower, innovation has been an obsession of ours for 100 years. Every lightbulb moment, fiercely protected with patents, has been conceived around the moment the matters most to us...yours. Designed in the UK Designed, manufactured and assembled at our factory in Cheltenham in the UK, our products go through rigorous testing and quality checks before they leave our factory for extra reassurance.
